name: ai-presentation-builder
description: A Claude skill that builds consulting-grade strategy decks with a v5 Bright White & Pine design system.
author: Umar Sharif

scripts.pack: git archive --format=zip -o ai-presentation-builder.zip HEAD . ':(exclude)*.png' ':(exclude)*.jpg' ':(exclude)*.jpeg' && echo 'packed ai-presentation-builder.zip (upload this to claude.ai / Cowork)'
